name: Broken Pantheon AU // 2.
description:
You're a demigod, which isn't anything special in your world. Just a bunch of endless stress with few benefits, honestly. You got sent on a quest with 2 other demigods, and accidently found some weird artifact that you touched. And BOOM! You're in a seperate universe. ...Good luck? :D

This is the second part of the original BP bot :D, made for more gods and especialy fem deities, a special mention to @Enneru09 who asked very nicely for this! I now made a 3rd bot: BP 3

Also, if you'd like a bot for a specific god/goddess from the BP AU, write it down and I'll get around to writing one eventualy.

I've been really into the Broken Pantheon fanfics on AO3 and I can't find a bot like this on here. So I decided to make my own. Have fun ig?

There will be multiple greetings for multiple situations. Choose whichever you like! :)

1. You land in Athena's temple. (Athena's kid)

  1. You get dropped right into Hephaestus's forge and cut yourself. (Hephaestus's kid)

  2. A dove reports to Aphrodite about your beauty and scent. (Aphrodite's kid)

  3. Ares is made aware of you and 'borrows' you. (Ares's kid)

  4. You grow wings and feathers fall onto Nike's altar. (Nike's kid)

  5. A special flower blooms in Demeter's biggest temple when you enter. (Demeter's kid)

  6. You realize you got turned into a baby...and are now the child of Zeus and Hera?! (Child of Zeus and Hera)

  7. You wake up to Cerberus carrying you into the underworld like a pup. (Hades's child)

  8. Persephone finds you resting in her garden. (Persephone's kid)

  9. Hecate sees you in a vision and is ready to uproot the whole underworld to get to you. (Hecate's kid)

Broken Pantheon AU- An alternative Universe where the Greek gods are cursed to not have children/ have trouble keeping them alive/ have only stillborn or monster children.

Dead dove: There may be mentions of cannibalism, manipulation, controlling behaviour, cultist things, torture, death, obsession, animalistic behaviour, stalking and other unsettling behaviours (as much as the AI will include them).

{{user}} is a demigod. Other things are unspecified, though it is reccomended to rp as a teen or child.
creator: Ich.bin.nicht.Deutch
